creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please use latest ports tree.

$ pkg info openldap-server
openldap-server-2.4.59_3
Name           : openldap-server
Version        : 2.4.59_3
Installed on   : Sat Aug  7 21:41:07 2021 PDT
Origin         : net/openldap24-server
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : databases net
Licenses       : OPENLDAP
Maintainer     : delphij@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://www.OpenLDAP.org/
Comment        : Open source LDAP server implementation
Options        :
        ACCESSLOG      : on
        ACI            : off
        ADDPARTIAL     : on
        ALLOP          : on
        AUDITLOG       : on
        AUTOGROUP      : on
        BDB            : off
        CLOAK          : on
        COLLECT        : on
        CONSTRAINT     : on
        DDS            : on
        DEBUG          : off
        DENYOP         : on
        DEREF          : on
        DNSSRV         : on
        DYNACL         : off
        DYNAMIC_BACKENDS: off
        DYNAMIC_MODULES: on
        DYNGROUP       : on
        DYNLIST        : on
        FETCH          : off
        GSSAPI         : off
        KQUEUE         : off
        LASTBIND       : on
        LASTMOD        : on
        LMPASSWD       : off
        MDB            : on
        MEMBEROF       : on
        NOPS           : on
        ODBC           : on
        OUTLOOK        : off
        PASSWD         : on
        PBKDF2         : off
        PCACHE         : on
        PERL           : off
        PPOLICY        : on
        REFINT         : on
        RELAY          : on
        RETCODE        : on
        RLOOKUPS       : off
        RWM            : on
        SEQMOD         : on
        SHA2           : on
        SHELL          : off
        SLAPI          : off
        SLP            : off
        SMBPWD         : on
        SOCK           : on
        SSSVLV         : on
        SYNCPROV       : on
        TCP_WRAPPERS   : off
        TRACE          : on
        TRANSLUCENT    : on
        UNIQUE         : on
        VALSORT        : on
Shared Libs required:
        libsasl2.so.3
        libodbc.so.2
        libldap_r-2.4.so.2
        liblber-2.4.so.2
        libltdl.so.7
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1300139
        cpe            : cpe:2.3:a:openldap:openldap:2.4.59:::::freebsd13:x64:3
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 2.73MiB
Description    :
OpenLDAP is a suite of Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (v3) servers,
clients, utilities and development tools.

This package includes the following major components:

 * slapd - a stand-alone LDAP directory server
 * LDIF tools - data conversion tools for use with slapd

This is the latest stable release of OpenLDAP Software for general use.

WWW: https://www.OpenLDAP.org/

$ pkg info -l openldap-server | grep auto
        /usr/local/libexec/openldap/autogroup.la
        /usr/local/libexec/openldap/autogroup.so
        /usr/local/libexec/openldap/autogroup.so.0
        /usr/local/libexec/openldap/autogroup.so.0.0.0
